name: Augmented Beef and Bacon Social Club Host

securitySheaf.label: Probe IC
securitySheaf.effect: A smiling host avatar checks loyalty credentials and purchase history.

securitySheaf.label: Scramble IC
securitySheaf.effect: Recipe cards and market data begin reshuffling around the intruder.

securitySheaf.label: Trace IC
securitySheaf.effect: A fulfillment-tracking process tries to attach a delivery address to the icon.

securitySheaf.label: Sparky IC
securitySheaf.effect: Industrial kitchen machinery arcs with hostile warning current.

sculpting: Private smokehouse club, mahogany counters, cold lockers, neon meat signs, branded crates, chef avatars, pit bosses, chrome pantry vaults, and predatory mascots.
notes: Refactored around the public-door/secure-door template. No run-specific rewards. Includes several generic paydata opportunities and one permanent recurring luxury snack order outcome that instructs the player to notify the GM.

nodes.title: Smokehouse Club Porch
nodes.description: A neon smokehouse sign buzzes over a private-club doorway. The host presents a public lifestyle-club door and a harder private corporate surface behind the branding.

choices.label: Use the public club visitor door
Breach the private fulfillment and strategy surface

nodes.title: Mahogany Public Club Lobby
nodes.description: Butcher-block counters, club plaques, cartoon smoke, and grinning mascot portraits sell the fantasy of belonging to an exclusive meat lifestyle society. This side is official visitor content only.

choices.label: Browse public menus and flavor propaganda

nodes.title: Public Menu Wall
nodes.description: Neon smokehouse signs advertise artificial beef, bacon-flavored lifestyle bundles, and limited-time novelty snacks. Make a note only if the team needs public product cover; no private data lives here.

choices.label: Return to the public club lobby

nodes.title: Public Loyalty Kiosk
nodes.description: A smiling mascot offers newsletters, coupon pings, and a loyalty membership tier called the Smoke Ring. This is noisy marketing, not a useful intrusion point by itself.

choices.label: Return to the public club lobby

nodes.title: Sanitized Sizzle Stage
nodes.description: Influencer clips loop on a tiny stage: smiling consumers, fake grill marks, and aspiration drenched in synthetic hickory. Tell the GM only if you want to cite public ad positioning later.

choices.label: Return to the public club lobby

nodes.title: Private Credential Smoker
nodes.description: Behind the mascot skin is a private login surface shaped like a steel smoker. Employee, vendor, fulfillment, and analytics permissions hang from hooks inside the smoke.

nodes.title: Private Smokehouse Subsystem Hub
nodes.description: You are inside the private side. Cold lockers, recipe books, analytics carcasses, subscription ledgers, fulfillment crates, and demo-control gates are available if you can beat the host pressure.

nodes.title: Customer Analytics Locker
nodes.description: You appear to have access to customer preference analytics: aspiration profiles, novelty buying, influencer response, and loyalty behavior. Tell the GM you have customer-analytics access; ask which segments, dates, or customer classes can be searched.

nodes.title: Supplier and Formula Records
nodes.description: You appear to have access to supplier records, flavor-profile research, test batches, and formula vault indexes. Tell the GM you have supplier/formula access; ask which vendor names, batch dates, and product lines are visible.

nodes.title: Subscription Fulfillment Controls
nodes.description: You appear to have access to subscription records, recurring orders, delivery addresses, and fulfillment queues. Tell the GM you have subscription/fulfillment access before making any permanent change.

choices.label: Insert recurring off-books luxury snack order

nodes.title: Factory / Demo Control Hooks
nodes.description: You appear to have access to demo machines, kitchen props, or factory-linked control hooks. Tell the GM you have demo/control access; confirm whether this host controls live equipment, records only, or a delayed demo environment.

nodes.title: Paydata: Customer Segmentation
nodes.description: You recover consumer-segmentation paydata: loyalty behavior, aspiration categories, novelty response, and campaign targeting notes. Tell the GM you recovered customer-segmentation paydata and make a note for valuation/fencing later.

choices.label: Log off with the customer-segmentation paydata

nodes.title: Paydata: Influencer Partnership Hooks
nodes.description: You recover influencer-partnership hooks and promo leverage. Tell the GM you recovered influencer/payola-style paydata; exact value, buyers, and consequences need GM handling.

choices.label: Log off with the influencer-hook paydata

nodes.title: Paydata: Supplier Irregularities
nodes.description: You recover supplier irregularity paydata: shell vendors, price anomalies, and suspicious fulfillment dependencies. Tell the GM you recovered supplier-irregularity paydata and note it for valuation/follow-up.

choices.label: Log off with the supplier paydata

nodes.title: Paydata: Flavor-Profile Research
nodes.description: You recover flavor-profile and formula research paydata. Tell the GM you recovered product-formula research; exact value depends on who wants embarrassing or proprietary meat-adjacent science.

choices.label: Log off with the formula paydata

nodes.title: Paydata: Fulfillment Routes
nodes.description: You recover fulfillment routing paydata: delivery lanes, vendor timing, and subscription logistics. Tell the GM you recovered fulfillment-route paydata and make a note for later valuation or operational use.

choices.label: Log off with the fulfillment paydata

nodes.title: Paydata: Demo-System Linkage
nodes.description: You recover proof that demo machines, branded kitchen props, or factory-linked systems connect through this host. Tell the GM you recovered demo-system linkage paydata and ask what physical systems this suggests.

choices.label: Log off with the demo-linkage paydata

nodes.title: Permanent Outcome: Luxury Snack Order
nodes.description: You insert a recurring off-the-books order of luxury vat-grown snacks to an address of the players' choice. Notify the GM immediately: this is a permanent campaign-state change. Tell the GM the destination address, delivery cadence, and any cover identity the decker used; until you tell the GM, the table should not assume the order exists.

choices.label: Make a note and return to subscription controls
Log off before fulfillment trace tightens

nodes.title: Loyalty Exit
nodes.description: The smoke clears into ordinary Matrix traffic, leaving only a coupon popup and the faint smell of fake bacon. Current-crawl lockouts are not permanent unless the GM says so; reset and retry after appropriate in-world time if allowed.
